title: Creamy Fermented Tomato Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy stir fry recipe using fermented vegetables, creamy sauce, and fresh tomatoes.

ingredients.name: Fermented Vegetables
ingredients.notes: Any variety of fermented vegetables, chopped

ingredients.name: Creamy Sauce
ingredients.notes: Any store-bought or homemade creamy sauce

ingredients.name: Stir Fry Oil
ingredients.notes: Any neutral-tasting oil, such as vegetable or canola oil

instructions: Heat the stir fry oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the chopped fermented vegetables and cook for 3-4 minutes until they start to soften.
Add the diced tomatoes and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes until they start to release their juices.
Pour in the creamy sauce and stir to combine. Bring the sauce to a simmer.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes until the sauce has thickened and the vegetables are coated.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed. If using soy sauce, add it now.
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
Optional: Garnish with chopped green onions or sesame seeds for added flavor and texture.
